title: Bernstein says Bitcoin mining deals necessary for AI power crunch
summary: Bernstein analysts remain bullish on the Bitcoin mining sector, as deals with third-party providers will be necessary to address the computing power limits of AI data centers.

title: HYPE falls as crypto funds queue nearly $150M in locked tokens for withdrawal
summary: HYPE briefly fell 8% from its local highs as Multicoin Capital, Selini Capital and Galaxy Digital queued nearly $150 million of the token for withdrawals.

title: US Stock Futures Drop as Traders Focus on AI Spending, Oil Jumps
summary: US stock futures retreated as worries over artificial-intelligence spending weighed on sentiment while oil prices closed in on $100 a barrel. Traders braced for more key earnings from Intel Corp., due later in the afternoon.

title: Cellnex Studies Strategic Options After Share Price Slump
summary: Cellnex Telecom SA is evaluating strategic options, according to people familiar with the matter, as the wireless tower operator looks at ways to grapple with its debt load and weak share price.

title: Crypto 'Wrench Attacks' Cost Victims $124M in Six Months, Up 12x: CertiK
summary: Physical attacks on crypto holders are increasingly happening at home, and France has become the epicenter, a new report finds.

title: ‘Not currently the right capital solution’: Smarter Web sells 178 bitcoin to repay $11.7M convertible instrument
summary: The Smarter Web Company sold 177.89 BTC at $65,762 to repay $11.7 million to TOBAM early, cancelling 7.7 million in potential share issuance.
